title: Full Stack Developer Intern (AI Focus | Class of 2026 | Conversion Opportunity)
company_focus:
AI consulting company building custom chatbots, knowledge
bases, and AI/ML solutions for clients
description:
Company Description

We are an innovative AI consulting company dedicated to
developing cutting-edge AI solutions for our clients. Our
services include creating custom chatbots, building and
managing knowledge bases, and integrating advanced AI/ML
solutions into existing products. Additionally, we develop
full-stack mobile and web applications with AI/ML
functionalities, including generative AI.

Job Description

Are you a passionate and curious student graduating in 2026,
eager to kickstart your career in full-stack development
within the exciting field of AI? We are seeking motivated
Full Stack Developer Interns to join our remote team!

This internship provides a unique opportunity to gain
significant hands-on experience working on real-world client
projects and internal tools. You'll be mentored by
experienced engineers, contribute meaningfully to our
development lifecycle, and work with a modern tech stack
including Node.js/Python (backend), React/Next.js
(frontend), and major cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure). High-
performing interns will be strongly considered for full-time
positions upon successful completion of their degree in
2026.

Qualifications

- Eligibility: Currently pursuing a Bachelor's or Master's
  degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related
  field, with an expected graduation date in 2026.
- Backend Foundation: Foundational programming knowledge
  demonstrated through coursework or projects, preferably
  including exposure to Node.js or Python.
- Frontend Foundation: Foundational web development knowledge
  demonstrated through coursework or projects, preferably
  including exposure to React or Next.js.
- Web Fundamentals: Solid understanding of HTML, CSS,
  JavaScript, and basic concepts of RESTful APIs.
- Core Concepts: Familiarity with database concepts
  (SQL/NoSQL) and version control using Git.
- Cloud Curiosity: A strong desire to learn about cloud
  computing (AWS, GCP, Azure) and related DevOps practices.
- Aptitude: Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
  coupled with a proactive learning attitude.
- Teamwork: Good communication and collaboration skills
  suitable for a remote environment.
responsibilities: Work on real-world client projects building AI-powered applications
Develop full-stack mobile and web applications with AI/ML functionalities including generative AI
Build and integrate custom chatbots and knowledge bases
Contribute to the development lifecycle with backend (Node.js/Python) and frontend (React/Next.js) work
Work with cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) on AI solution deployments
Collaborate with experienced engineers in a remote team environment
use_cases: AI/ML integration into existing client products
Full-stack applications with generative AI capabilities
Advanced AI/ML solutions for enterprise clients
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is an AI consulting company where interns work directly
on AI/ML solutions including custom chatbots, knowledge
bases, and generative AI functionalities integrated into
full-stack applications. The role involves hands-on
development of AI-powered features for client projects.
